name: python3-libfwsi
title: python3-libfwsi
summary: Windows Shell Item format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
Windows Shell Item format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libfwsi is a library to access the Windows Shell Item format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libfwsi.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libfwsi because Windows Shell Item format access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libfwsi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libfwsi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libfwsi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
